**DEPRECATED:** This skill is a dead path — the taskvisor daemon dispatches `/tmux:investigate`, never `/tmux:validate`. The env/code/spec classification table that used to live here now lives in `investigate-worker.xml` step 3 (the live per-check classifier). This alias is retained one release; do not extend it.

**Requires:** `tmux-cli` MCP server.

Follow `.claude/commands/tmux/validate.xml` EXACTLY as written. That file is now a thin deprecation stub pointing at `/tmux:investigate`. Do not modify any source files.
